input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.3.2
            TITLE: threaded fasteners used to secure and/or seal the intake manifold must have a positive

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.3.2: Threaded fasteners used to secure and/or seal the intake manifold must have a Positive
IC.2.3.2 Threaded fasteners used to secure and/or seal the intake manifold must have a Positive 
Locking Mechanism, see T.8.3.

final_answer: Threaded fasteners used to secure and/or seal the intake manifold must have a Positive Locking Mechanism, see T.8.3.
